name: Cohere Embed API
what_it_does: Generates high-quality text embeddings via embed-english-v3.0 and embed-multilingual-v3.0 models, supporting batch encoding of up to 96 texts with configurable compression and input-type-aware representations.
use_cases: Encoding document chunks for RAG pipelines with search_document input type
Encoding user queries at retrieval time with search_query input type for asymmetric search
Classifying support tickets or emails using classification input type embeddings
Building multilingual semantic search across 100+ languages with embed-multilingual-v3.0
Reducing vector storage costs with int8 or binary compression on v3 models
not_for: Generative text completion or chat — use Cohere Command models instead
Audio, image, or multimodal embedding tasks
best_when: You need production-quality text embeddings with fine-grained input-type control and optional int8/binary compression for cost-efficient vector storage.
avoid_when: You need sub-100ms p50 latency for single-text online serving or require OpenAI-compatible drop-in embedding endpoints without code changes.

auth.notes: API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header or as X-API-Key header. Trial keys available without credit card.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial API key with rate-limited access; no monthly free quota on production keys
pricing.paid_tiers: Per 1M tokens — embed-english-v3.0 and embed-multilingual-v3.0 priced per token ingested
pricing.notes: Trial keys are rate-limited to ~100 calls/min. Production keys require billing setup. Batch size of 96 texts per request helps minimize per-request overhead costs.

performance.rate_limits: Production: ~10,000 texts/min; Trial: ~100 requests/min. Batch up to 96 texts per request.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors include structured JSON with message and status code; input_type validation errors are clear but truncation errors can be opaque.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Embedding generation is stateless and deterministic for a given model version; same input always returns same vector.
known_agent_gotchas: input_type parameter is required for v3 models — omitting it causes degraded retrieval quality, not an error, so silent quality regression is possible
Max 96 texts per batch; agents chunking documents must implement their own batching loop
Text longer than the model's token limit (512 tokens for v3) is silently truncated without warning
Embedding dimensions differ by model (1024 for v3 English, 768 for multilingual); mixing models in the same vector index causes silent similarity failures
int8 and binary compression options change vector semantics — vectors compressed differently are not comparable and must use matching compression at query time

security_score_components.security_notes: API keys have no scope restriction — a leaked key grants full account access. Key rotation is supported via dashboard. No IP allowlisting on free tier.
